PostToolUse.command: pwsh -NoProfile -Command "$input = $Input | ConvertFrom-Json; $tool = $input.toolUse.toolName; $path = $input.toolUse.input.filePath; if ($tool -eq 'create_file' -and $path -match 'Hounds[\\/][A-Z]\w+Hound\.cs$') { $hound = [System.IO.Path]::GetFileNameWithoutExtension($path); $json = @{ systemMessage = \"REMINDER: You just created a new hound class ($hound). Ensure you also create: (1) eval scenarios in src/Hound.Eval/Scenarios/$hound/ (minimum 5), (2) a JSON config in Config/, (3) DI registration in Program.cs, (4) unit tests. Run 'dotnet run --project src/Hound.Eval -- --dry-run' to validate.\" } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress; Write-Output $json }"
